hero.subheadline: Specialty coffee in the heart of San Miguel de Allende

about_snippet.heading: Crafting the Perfect Brew
about_snippet.body: Nestled in the heart of San Miguel de Allende's Centro, Ki'bok Coffee is more than a café — it's a space where organic Mexican-sourced beans meet homemade pastries and locally sourced meals. A comfortably elegant space that encourages conversation.
about_snippet.terroir: Every cup tells a story of Mexican terroir — from the highlands of Chiapas to the mountains of Oaxaca.

food.heading: More Than Coffee
food.subheading: From traditional Mexican breakfasts to fresh-baked pastries — every dish is made with locally sourced ingredients and cooked with love.
food.mexican_desc: Start your morning the authentic way — chilaquiles verdes or rojos, huevos rancheros, enfrijoladas, and fresh salsas made daily. Our traditional Mexican breakfast is the real deal.
food.gringo_desc: Avocado toast on house sourdough, granola bowls with seasonal fruit, eggs your way, and the smoothest cold brew in Centro. Comfort food, Ki'bok style.
food.pastry_desc: Fresh-baked croissants, banana bread with walnuts, seasonal cakes, and treats that pair perfectly with your afternoon espresso. All made in-house, every single day.

cowork.heading: Come Work at Ki'bok
cowork.subheading: Fast WiFi, great coffee, and a space designed for getting things done. Remote workers and digital nomads — you're home.
cowork.wifi_desc: Reliable, fast internet that keeps up with your video calls and uploads.
cowork.power_desc: Every table has easy access to outlets. No fighting for a plug.
cowork.vibe_desc: Not too loud, not too quiet. Dark, moody, focused — with a cortado always within reach.

location.proximity: 5 min walk from the Jardín Principal

menu_page.subheading: Crafted daily with organic Mexican beans, homemade pastries, and locally sourced meals.

about_page.intro: Ki'bok Coffee was born from a deep love for Mexican coffee and the belief that every cup should tell a story. We source our beans directly from organic producers across Mexico, roast them with care, and serve them in spaces designed to bring people together.
about_page.beans_body_1: Every bean we serve is sourced directly from organic producers in Chiapas, Oaxaca, and Veracruz. We believe in transparent relationships with our farmers — fair prices, sustainable practices, and exceptional quality from seed to cup.
about_page.beans_body_2: Our roasting process honors each origin's unique character, bringing out the natural sweetness, complexity, and depth that make Mexican coffee extraordinary.
about_page.space_body_1: Our San Miguel de Allende location sits on Diez de Sollano y Dávalos, one of Centro's most beautiful streets. The space is an intimate retreat — dark, moody, and warm, with artistic wall elements and bar seating that invites you to stay a while.
about_page.space_body_2: It's a place where expats meet locals, where artists find inspiration, and where every conversation is accompanied by something delicious.
about_page.craft_body: Behind every great cup is a passionate team. Our baristas are trained to honor the craft — from precise extraction to latte art, every detail matters.
about_page.pull_quote: Coffee is more than a beverage — it's an experience that connects farmers, roasters, baristas, and you.

visit_page.subheading: We're in the heart of Centro, on one of San Miguel's most beautiful streets.

jardin.title: Jardín Principal
jardin.desc: The main square, just a 2-minute walk. Grab a coffee and sit in the jardín.

parroquia.title: La Parroquia
parroquia.desc: The iconic pink parish church — unmissable and right around the corner.

aurora.title: Fábrica La Aurora
aurora.desc: Art galleries and workshops in a converted textile factory. 10 min walk.

mercado.title: Mercado de Artesanías
mercado.desc: Local crafts, textiles, and souvenirs. Perfect for a morning browse.

contact_page.heading: Say Hello
contact_page.subheading: Questions, catering inquiries, or just want to say hello? Drop us a line.
contact_page.name: Name
contact_page.success_body: We'll get back to you soon.

blog_page.heading: Blog
blog_page.subheading: Stories from the roastery, guides for home brewing, and dispatches from San Miguel de Allende.

iced_latte.name: Iced Latte
iced_latte.desc: Espresso over ice with cold milk

chilaquiles.name: Chilaquiles
chilaquiles.desc: Green or red salsa, crema, queso fresco
